sections.paragraph:
Original: מועדה מעד מועד

Transliteration: mô‛êd mô‛êd mô‛âdâh

Phonetic: mo-ade'

BDB Definition:

  1. appointed place, appointed time, meeting
    1. appointed time
      1. appointed time (general)
      2. sacred season, set feast, appointed season
    2. appointed meeting
    3. appointed place
    4. appointed sign or signal
    5. tent of meeting

Origin: from H3259

TWOT entry: 878b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
